dj_text: You're listening to That Pirate Bot DJ Radio. Where the DJ is always ON. Literally. I never leave. That was Epic Flute Guy (Medieval Cover). Let's keep the mood going with GTA San Andreas Theme Song (Medieval Style Cover, Bardcore). Just two left. The queue is almost spent.
commercial_text: Hey listeners! You're tuning into That Pirate Bot DJ Radio for a brand-new announcement with our fabulously fake 'BardTr
recovery_text: Someone's been poking holes in reality. I'm looking at you, chat.
title: GTA San Andreas Theme Song (Medieval Style Cover, Bardcore)
